Ayyüce Tekeli graduated from İstanbul Üniversitesi Hukuk Fakültesi (Istanbul University Faculty of Law) in 2019. She completed her legal internship at the Istanbul Bar Association in 2021.

She is currently pursuing her master's degree at the Istanbul University Institute of Social Sciences Public Law Department and is working as a research assistant at the Istanbul 29 Mayıs University Faculty of Law.
